Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs."in.comstock_building_type" AS comstock_building_type, sum(1) AS sample_count, sum(bs.weight * bs."in.sqft..ft2") AS units_count, sum(bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" * bs.weight * bs."in.sqft..ft2") AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" 
FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs 
WHERE bs.applicability = true AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs.state = 'CO' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/4980384616c71156043f0223a09f88940c2c87e4a7be7e5b27205dd9dbcc0a02/ff481307-2127-47c6-825e-9b206c747bf3/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
